markdown.markdown:
About me

Charlotte Matthews

B.S. in Applied Mathematics (minor in Data Science) at Baylor University (May 2026, GPA 3.73). I like building dashboards and data products that translate complex data into clear decisions—especially in marketing + customer analytics and applied modeling.

Projects

Built an interactive Sigma dashboard on a 2.6B-row dataset to help brands analyze buyer personas and improve channel allocation strategies. Created scalable YoY sales/customer tables in Snowflake and built visuals and filters for regional segmentation and insights.
Sigma Snowflake Dashboards Customer Personas
Project link →
### 2) IMDb Data Analysis in R Analyzed an IMDb dataset (5,273 movies, 27 features). Built visualizations in R to explore audience ratings over time, runtime, box office performance, and rating systems; presented findings in a structured PowerPoint.
R ggplot2 EDA Visualization
Project link →

Resume

### Education **Baylor University — Waco, TX** B.S. Applied Mathematics, Minor in Data Science (May 2026) GPA: 3.73 / 4.00 Relevant coursework: Mathematical Statistics II, Regression Analysis, ODE, Linear Algebra, Probability & Statistics, Intro to Data Science, Database Design, Cloud Computing, Numerical Analysis. ### Skills **Languages:** Python, R, SQL, Julia, LaTeX **Libraries:** Pandas, Matplotlib, NumPy, Tidyverse, ggplot2, readr, broom **Tools:** RStudio, Snowflake, Sigma, PyCharm, Google Workspace, Linear **Concepts:** Data Engineering, Data Visualization, Cloud, Regression, Databases ### Experience **Seek Insights — Data Science Intern (Jun 2025–Aug 2025)** - Sigma dashboard on 2.6B rows supporting brand persona insights - Snowflake YoY tables using 5.6M customers + 935K products - Segmentation filters across 16,597 cities into 5 personas - Communicated technical results to marketing + tech stakeholders

Download

Grab the full PDF resume here:

Open Resume PDF

Extras

  • 100+ hours community service
  • Service trip supporting Ecuadorian community road project
  • Summited Mount Shavano (14,230 ft)
